summary: The Board of Trustees returned from executive session and voted to reassign Officer Chris McMillan from Road Patrol to Detective effective June 20, 2022. The regular meeting was then adjourned at 8:17 PM.
decisions: Approved reassignment of Officer Chris McMillan from Road Patrol to Detective effective 6/20/2022
Approved motion to adjourn the regular meeting at 8:17 PM
action_items: Implement reassignment of Officer Chris McMillan from Road Patrol to Detective effective 6/20/2022
notable_topics: Personnel reassignment of Officer Chris McMillan
attendees: Officer Chris McMillan (discussed, not present as speaker)
notes: This is Part 2 of the meeting recording, capturing the return from executive session and adjournment. The roll call for adjournment appears to call on Trustee Hodges twice, likely a verbal error where one call should have been for Trustee House.
title: BOT MTG 6.14.22 Part 2.mp4
